name: Recruiter: AI search by position (parameterized)
description: PARAMETERIZED AI-Copilot search for the Odoo→Recruiter pipeline. Step 5 types 'Buscar candidatos para: {{position}}' into textarea.copilot-chat-input__textbox + submit (\n) → AI builds & runs the search → extract candidate cards (recruiter_search_people → name + /talent/profile/ URL + headline). backend create_run substitutes runtime_params.position. The AI Copilot is the recording's real search entry (steps 13-15) — far more reliable than the advanced facets. Param: position.
